launch_app.description: Activate or start the configured Android app.

input.description: Clear and type into a visible editable UI element.

wait_visible.description: Wait until a UI element is visible.

assert_visible.description: Assert that a UI element is visible.

assert_text.description: Assert that text is visible on the current screen.

scroll_to_text.description: Scroll a visible Android scrollable container until the requested text is visible.

swipe.description: Swipe by direction within the viewport or a target element, or from start to end coordinates.

scroll.description: Scroll by direction within the viewport or a target element, or from start to end coordinates.

drag_and_drop.description: Drag from a source element to a target element, or from start to end coordinates.

clear.description: Clear a visible editable UI element without typing a new value.

press_key.description: Press an Android key by common alias or numeric keycode.

hide_keyboard.description: Hide the soft keyboard if it is open.

assert_checked.description: Assert that a visible element is checked.

assert_enabled.description: Assert that a visible element is enabled.

assert_selected.description: Assert that a visible element is selected.

assert_text_equals.description: Assert that a visible element's text equals the supplied text.

assert_text_contains.description: Assert that a visible element's text contains the supplied text.

wait_gone.description: Wait until a target element is gone or no longer visible.

assert_not_visible.description: Assert that a target element is absent or not visible.

background_app.description: Send the current app to the background.

activate_app.description: Activate the configured app or a supplied app_package.

terminate_app.description: Terminate the configured app or a supplied app_package.

change_orientation.description: Change device orientation to PORTRAIT or LANDSCAPE.

accept_permission.description: Accept the current permission or alert dialog.

dismiss_dialog.description: Dismiss the current dialog or alert.

pinch.description: Pinch close on a target element or rectangular area.

zoom.description: Pinch open or zoom on a target element or rectangular area.

w3c_actions.description: Run a raw W3C actions payload for advanced or multi-pointer gestures.
